system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Arm Strike
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

This powerful strike draws Qi into the fist so it can destroy solid matter like stone or iron. To use Third Fist of Yanshi, make an Arm Strike Skill roll against the desired object’s Hardiness (if the object is difficult to hit due to size or movement you must make an initial Attack roll). If you succeed you shatter up to a foot per Qi level of material. On a Total Success, you can shatter up to 10 feet per Qi level of material. Your Rank in Neigong determines what material is susceptible to your strike. RANK MATERIAL VULNERABLE TO STRIKE 1 Wood/Hard Glass 2 Stone/Iron/Bronze 3 Diamond Cathartic: On a Cathartic use of the power you can do one of two things. The first is strike the ground and cause it to shake for one round per Rank of Qi. This forces anyone in a 50-foot area to make an Athletics roll (using your Arm Strike result as a TN) or fall prone, it also cuts movement in half for ev eryone in the area. The second is you can use the Technique against creatures or people made from the material in question. If used against such beings, you Attack normally, add your Neigong to your Damage roll and do Open Damage. Against creatures that regenerate or restore after destruction, this doubles the time it takes for them to do so.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: You must make an initial Attack roll).
